name: SoundCloud
description: Music and audio streaming platform with creator uploads
longDescription:
SoundCloud is an audio streaming platform where creators upload tracks, mixes, podcasts, and demos directly to their own profile. Listeners can stream, like, comment on specific moments in a track, and follow artists they discover.

The catalog blends mainstream releases with a deep pool of independent and unreleased music, including DJ sets, remixes, beat tapes, and bedroom recordings that often don't appear on other services. Comments anchored to a waveform timestamp give it a social feel that is unusual among streaming apps.

SoundCloud is widely used by emerging artists to publish music quickly, by DJs to share long-form mixes, and by listeners looking for tracks outside major-label catalogs. Free listening is supported by ads, and paid Go and Go+ tiers add offline listening and an expanded licensed catalog.

features.title: Direct artist uploads
features.description: Anyone can sign up as a creator and publish their own tracks, mixes, or podcasts.

features.title: Waveform comments
features.description: Listeners leave timestamped comments at specific points in a track to react to moments.

features.title: Long-form audio
features.description: DJ mixes, podcasts, and full-length sets are first-class content alongside individual songs.

features.title: Personalized stations
features.description: Daily mixes and weekly recommendations adapt to your listening history and follows.

features.title: Creator analytics
features.description: Uploaders see plays, listener locations, and engagement stats on their tracks and profile.

useCases: Discovering independent and unreleased music outside major labels
Listening to DJ mixes, podcasts, and long-form audio
Publishing your own tracks as an emerging artist or producer
Reposting and supporting friends' work in the SoundCloud community
Embedding tracks and players on personal sites and social profiles

faq.question: Is SoundCloud free?
faq.answer: Free listening is supported by ads, while Go and Go+ subscriptions remove ads, enable offline play, and unlock the full licensed catalog.

faq.question: Can I upload my own music?
faq.answer: Yes, any registered user can upload tracks, with free accounts capped on total upload time and Pro accounts offering unlimited uploads.

faq.question: Does SoundCloud pay artists?
faq.answer: Eligible creators can monetize through SoundCloud's Next Pro and fan-powered royalty programs based on streams and subscriptions.

faq.question: Can I download tracks for offline listening?
faq.answer: Offline listening in the mobile app requires a Go or Go+ subscription; some artists also enable direct downloads of individual tracks.
